summary: The diff implements a comprehensive React-based business website for Sai Ekvira Graphics covering all 10 requirements. All major sections are present: Navbar (REQ-9, REQ-10), Hero (REQ-2), About (REQ-3), Services (REQ-4), Gallery (REQ-5), WhyChooseUs (REQ-6), Contact (REQ-7), Footer (REQ-8), FloatingWhatsApp (REQ-7), and the useLanguage hook (REQ-10). The CMYK theme, phone numbers, and Google Maps embed are all addressed. A few minor gaps exist around specific acceptance criteria details.

hallucinated_features.description: InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook wrapping the app with ICP authentication infrastructure
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request explicitly states no user authentication or login is required. The diff includes full Internet Identity auth client setup, useActor hook, and wraps the entire app in InternetIdentityProvider — none of which were requested.

hallucinated_features.description: QueryClientProvider and React Query setup in main.tsx
hallucinated_features.reason: No backend queries are needed per the build request (no backend required), and useQueries.ts itself notes this. Wrapping the app in QueryClientProvider adds unrequested infrastructure.

hallucinated_features.description: Stats bar in the Hero section showing '500+ Happy Clients', '10+ Years Experience', '1000+ Projects Done'
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request specifies the hero content as business name, tagline, and three CTA buttons only. The stats bar with these specific metrics was not requested.

hallucinated_features.description: WhatsApp icon link added to the Footer social media section
hallucinated_features.reason: REQ-8 specifies only Instagram and Facebook placeholder social media icons/links in the footer. Adding a WhatsApp link in the footer was not requested.

hallucinated_features.description: CTA buttons (Call and WhatsApp) added to the WhyChooseUs section
hallucinated_features.reason: REQ-6 only requests 6 feature cards with icons. Adding call/WhatsApp CTA buttons inside the WhyChooseUs section was not requested.

hallucinated_features.description: Lightbox with previous/next navigation arrows between gallery images
hallucinated_features.reason: REQ-5 only requests a lightbox/modal to view each image in full size on click. Navigation between images in the lightbox was not specified.
The build request explicitly states no backend is required. An empty Motoko actor file was still added.
